nasb.text: As for you, take for yourself some of all food which is edible, and gather it to yourself; and it shall be for food for you and for them.”

esv.text: Also take with you every sort of food that is eaten, and store it up. It shall serve as food for you and for them.”

cnv.text: 你要拿各種可吃的食物，積存起來，好作你和牠們的食物。”

ccb.text: 你要为自己和这些动物预备各种食物，贮存起来。”

csbs.text: 你要从各样可吃的食物中都带上一些，收聚在你这里，作为你和它们的食物。”
